title: Command Cockpit Footer Overlay
summary: Converted the mounted-stage footer rail into a compact overlay so the cockpit Overview keeps status visible without adding another scroll row.
changes: Changed the Command Cockpit Overview footer rail from sticky content to an absolute glass HUD overlay.
Added mounted-stage bottom padding so the overlay stays readable without pushing the page taller.
Compressed footer status cells into compact two-column readouts.
Reduced mobile footer height and spacing while keeping status labels readable.
Recorded the footer-overlay pass as the latest platform UI unlock in generated snapshot history.
